description.value:
A gleaming steel point mouted atop a stout wooden haft, the spear may be wielded in one hand or two and can puncture through the heaviest armor with deadly force.

This item is crafted from Elven Steel, renowned for its lightweight and superior craftsmanship. It reduces the weight of the item and provides a +1 bonus to Dexterity checks. Additionally, it deals an extra +1d2-1 damage.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
A block of incense made from local herbs and plants, designed to repel normal insects. When lit, it releases a pleasant aroma that keeps insects at bay.

Effect: Repels normal insects within a 20-foot radius centered on the burning block

Special Notes: Does not protect against giant insects or the vile swarms described in appendix A of the Monster Manual.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
This item is crafted from reed woven materials, known for their flexibility and lightweight nature.

It provides advantage on saving throws against exhaustion, a +1 bonus to Dexterity checks and saving throws, and a +1 bonus to initiative.

The item is lightweight, provides a cooling effect, and offers +2 to saving throws against jungle heat hazards.

However, it has fire vulnerability, taking double damage from fire attacks.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
Boots enchanted to create a gentle breeze around the wearer’s feet, reducing the effects of heat.

Grants a +1 bonus on Constitution saving throws against heat and humidity.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
A lengthy stright blade designed for slashing foes, the longsword is a highly versatile weapon that may also be wielded with two hands for more punishing strikes.

This item is crafted from Elven Steel, renowned for its lightweight and superior craftsmanship. It reduces the weight of the item and provides a +1 bonus to Dexterity checks. Additionally, it deals an extra +1d2-1 damage.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: A kit containing various herbs and plants from Chult with medicinal properties, useful for treating wounds, diseases, and poisons. Provides a +2 bonus on Constitution saving throws to treat insect bites and neutralize poison.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: A wide-brimmed hat made from local palm leaves, providing shade and cooling. Offers a +2 bonus on Constitution saving throws against heat-related conditions.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
A crescent blade is mounted on the end of a tall metal shaft. This polearm provies the ability to attack with deadly efficiency from greater range than typical melee weapons.

This item is crafted from Elven Steel, renowned for its lightweight and superior craftsmanship. It reduces the weight of the item and provides a +1 bonus to Dexterity checks. Additionally, it deals an extra +1d2-1 damage.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
This small statuette, carved from a single piece of emerald, depicts a dinosaur native to Chult. The craftsmanship is exquisite, capturing the fierce majesty of the creature in intricate detail.

Notes: Due to its unique nature, this item is likely to fetch a higher price if sold to a collector or museum.

A yklwa (pronounced YICK-ul-wah) is a simple melee weapon that is the traditional weapon of Chultan warriors. A yklwa consists of a 3-foot wooden shaft with a steel or stone blade up to 18 inches long. It costs 1 gp, and it deals 1d8 piercing damage on a hit. Although it has the thrown weapon property, the yklwa is not well balanced for throwing (range 10/30 ft.).

This item is crafted from obsidian, renowned for its razor-sharp edges. It deals an extra +1 slashing damage.

Any hit with this item causes the target to suffer from bleeding, requiring them to make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw at the start of each of its turns. On a failure, the target takes 1d4 damage. The bleeding stops when the target succeeds on the saving throw or uses an action to staunch the wound.

The item is lightweight, weighing 25% less than standard counterparts.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
A greasy, odorless salve made from a secret blend of local ingredients.

This repellent is applied to the skin and provides long-lasting protection against normal insects.

The scent keeps biting insects at bay, providing some protection against insect bites.

Capacity: Contains 20 applications

Duration: One application protects the wearer for 24 hours

Effect: Protects against normal insects

Special Notes: The salve is waterproof and does not wash off in rain. Does not protect against giant insects or the vile swarms described in appendix A of the Monster Manual.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
A large, iridescent scale from a dragon turtle, set in a silver pendant. It glimmers with a spectrum of colors and is believed to bring good luck to sailors.

Notes: Sailors and merchants in Port Nyanzaru highly value this item for its supposed protective properties.
A set of tools and equipment designed for climbing the tall trees and cliffs of Chult, including ropes, pitons, and a harness.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
This ornate mask is made of gold and decorated with colorful feathers and precious stones. It represents a Chultan tribal deity and is used in ceremonial dances and rituals.

Notes: Often haggled over by collectors of exotic artifacts or used in bartering with local tribes.

This item is crafted from reed woven materials, known for their flexibility and lightweight nature.

It provides advantage on saving throws against exhaustion, a +1 bonus to Dexterity checks and saving throws, and a +1 bonus to initiative. The item is lightweight, provides a cooling effect, and offers +2 to saving throws against jungle heat hazards.

However, it has fire vulnerability, taking double damage from fire attacks.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
A sturdy, wooden canoe designed for traversing the rivers and lakes of Chult.

This canoe is essential for navigating the waterways of Port Nyanzaru and its surrounding jungles.

It is long and narrow, built for both speed and stability, and can accommodate up to six Medium creatures. The canoe is equipped with paddles and basic flotation devices.

Capacity: Holds up to six Medium creatures

Speed: Maximum speed of 2 mph

Special Notes: Identical to a rowboat as detailed in chapter 5 of the Dungeon Master's Guide, except it is specifically designed for river travel and comes with paddles.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
This elixir is created from hallucinogenic plants in the jungles of Chult.

Any character that drinks a dose of the tincture must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw.

Characters who are immune to the poisoned condition succeed automatically.

On a failed save, the character begins to experience illusory sights, sounds, smells, and sensations that seem real.

Casting a lesser restoration spell or similar magic on the character ends the effect, which otherwise lasts for 1d4 + 4 hours.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
Made of interlocking metal rings, chain mail includes a layer of quilted fabric worn underneath the mail to prevent chafing and to cushion the impact of blows. The suit includes gauntlets.

This item is crafted from Elven Steel, renowned for its lightweight and superior craftsmanship. It reduces the weight of the item and provides a +1 bonus to Dexterity saving throws.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
A yklwa (pronounced YICK-ul-wah) is a simple melee weapon that is the traditional weapon of Chultan warriors. A yklwa consists of a 3-foot wooden shaft with a steel or stone blade up to 18 inches long. It costs 1 gp, and it deals 1d8 piercing damage on a hit. Although it has the thrown weapon property, the yklwa is not well balanced for throwing (range 10/30 ft.).

This item is made from Coral Steel, a blend of metal and coral.

It provides a +1 bonus to damage rolls and incurs no disadvantage on attack rolls while underwater.

The dense coral structure imposes a -1 penalty to attack rolls but grants an additional +1d4 bonus to damage rolls. The item is heavier, increasing its weight by 50%.

Additionally, it is cold to the touch, providing a cooling effect that helps against environmental heat.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
A tunic made from special lightweight, breathable material that allows for better air circulation.

Grants a minor bonus on Constitution saving throws against heat and humidity.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: A broad, heavy knife used for cutting through dense jungle undergrowth. Grants a +3 bonus on Dexterity saving throws against undergrowth hazards.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
Made of interlocking metal rings, a chain shirt is worn between layers of clothing or leather. This armor offers modest protection to the wearer's upper body and allows the sound of the rings rubbing against one another to be muffled by outer layers.

This item is crafted from Elven Steel, renowned for its lightweight and superior craftsmanship. It reduces the weight of the item and provides a +1 bonus to Dexterity saving throws.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value: Small tablets made from local minerals and herbs that purify water, making it safe to drink by removing diseases and toxins.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
A thin tensile metal blade, light in weight but long in reach designed for quick darting attacks to target weak points in enemy defenses with lightning swiftness.

This item is crafted from Elven Steel, renowned for its lightweight and superior craftsmanship. It reduces the weight of the item and provides a +1 bonus to Dexterity checks. Additionally, it deals an extra +1d2-1 damage.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
A yklwa (pronounced YICK-ul-wah) is a simple melee weapon that is the traditional weapon of Chultan warriors. A yklwa consists of a 3-foot wooden shaft with a steel or stone blade up to 18 inches long. It costs 1 gp, and it deals 1d8 piercing damage on a hit. Although it has the thrown weapon property, the yklwa is not well balanced for throwing (range 10/30 ft.).

This item is crafted from hardened bamboo, known for its lightweight and flexibility.

It provides a +3 bonus to initiative rolls and a +2 bonus to Dexterity checks and saving throws as long as it is equipped and actively used in combat.

If the DM feels the weapon is not being used actively enough in combat, these bonuses will be removed.

However, it is weak against hard surfaces, causing the wielder to have disadvantage on attack rolls against targets with natural armor or wearing metal armor.

Bamboo sap provides some protection against insects.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
This sturdy hammer is small enough to be nimbly wielded or used in combination with another weapon.

This item is crafted from Elven Steel, renowned for its lightweight and superior craftsmanship. It reduces the weight of the item and provides a +1 bonus to Dexterity checks. Additionally, it deals an extra +1d2-1 damage.

description.value:
This delicate anklet is crafted from silver and adorned with small rubies and sapphires. It jingles softly when worn, and the gems catch the light with every movement.

Notes: Popular among the wealthy of Port Nyanzaru, this item can be sold or traded at jewelry shops for a good price.

This two handed bow is somewhat smaller than the traditional longbow variant, making it well suited for rapid attacks while on the move or mounted from horseback.

This item is crafted from Elven smiths, renowned for its lightweight and superior craftsmanship. It reduces the weight of the item and provides a +1 bonus to Dexterity checks. Additionally, it deals an extra +1d2-1 damage.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
A bandana soaked in a special solution that keeps it cool for several hours.

Grants a minor bonus on Constitution saving throws against heat.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
A medium sized blade with a firm crossguard and a leather-wrapped handle. A versatile weapon which makes up in versatility what it lacks in reach.

This item is crafted from Elven Steel, renowned for its lightweight and superior craftsmanship. It reduces the weight of the item and provides a +1 bonus to Dexterity checks. Additionally, it deals an extra +1d2-1 damage.

magic-items-2.destroyFlavorText: reaches 0 charges: it crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

description.value:
A simple and portable contraption made from a 5-foot-square leather tarp and a wooden frame with legs. When assembled, it forms a basin capable of catching and holding rainwater.

Essential for survival in the jungles of Chult, the rain catcher can collect up to 2 gallons of drinking water per inch of rainfall and hold a maximum of 8 gallons.

  1. Capacity: Catches up to 2 gallons of water per inch of rainfall; holds up to 8 gallons
  2. Special Notes: The tarp and wooden frame fold up for easy transport, making it convenient for travelers and adventurers.

This curved blade is wide near the wrapped handle but arcs and tapers towards a gleaming tip.

This item is crafted from Elven Steel, renowned for its lightweight and superior craftsmanship. It reduces the weight of the item and provides a +1 bonus to Dexterity checks. Additionally, it deals an extra +1d2-1 damage.

description.value:
A short metal blade mounted to a small hilt and crossguard. The dagger makes an effective side armament for hardened warriors or a hidden blade for assassins and thieves.

This item is crafted from Elven Steel, renowned for its lightweight and superior craftsmanship. It reduces the weight of the item and provides a +1 bonus to Dexterity checks. Additionally, it deals an extra +1d2-1 damage.

description.value:
A tattered piece of parchment that appears to be part of an ancient map. It shows a portion of Chult with markings that suggest hidden treasures or lost cities.

Notes: Adventurers and explorers might pay well for this, hoping it leads to greater riches

This armor is leather armor with heavy rings sewn into it. The rings help reinforce the armor against blows from swords and axes. Ring mail is inferior to chain mail, and it's usually worn only by those who can't afford better armor.

This item is crafted from Elven Steel, renowned for its lightweight and superior craftsmanship. It reduces the weight of the item and provides a +1 bonus to Dexterity saving throws.
